---
title: "09 Weighted Gene Co-expression Network Analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(WGCNA)

# Global Parameters
# Soft threshold and module merging parameters

# Data Import
# Import cleaned expression matrix and clinical trait data

# Data Analysis
# 1. Sample clustering and outlier removal
# 2. Optimal soft threshold selection
# 3. Gene co-expression module identification
# 4. Module-trait correlation analysis
# 5. Core gene screening of key modules

# Visualization
# Module clustering tree, trait correlation heatmap

# Result Export
# Output WGCNA module gene list and statistical results

# Result Description
# Explain module screening criteria and trait association mechanism
